description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a flared rim and a narrow neck that widens towards the base. The exterior is decorated with a hand-painted urban scene, featuring stylized houses with yellow and green roofs, black windows, and white walls, set against a light, slightly textured background. The artwork wraps around the body of the vase, creating a continuous panoramic effect. The base is slightly raised and painted a dark green, providing a subtle contrast to the lighter body. The surface appears matte with a slight sheen, suggesting a glazed ceramic finish. The vase is hollow, designed to hold flowers or serve as a decorative centerpiece.
description: A tall, flared ceramic vase with hand-painted houses in yellow, green, and white, set against a light matte background. The vase features a continuous urban motif and a dark green base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the widest part of the painted urban scene, with multiple houses and a prominent yellow roof.
description_view_1: This view highlights a single house with a yellow roof and black windows, with more negative space on the vase's surface.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a green-roofed house with a brown door, and less crowded artwork compared to other sides.
description_view_3: This view presents a cluster of houses with yellow and green roofs, emphasizing the panoramic cityscape motif.
